attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER AS BK_DEAL_ID,
DEAL.APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE AS APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DTM,
-999 AS RU_LGL_ASRR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS RU_FN_CNTLR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
TRIM(CAST(COALESCE(PDEAL.OPTY_NUMBER,-999) AS BIGINT)) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_ID, --Added to avoid dot and spaces as part of ccw data fix Aug rel
COALESCE(NP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY,-999) AS OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
CASE WHEN	TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5,7)  THEN DEAL.MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE 
 WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (1,3) THEN QUOTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE 
ELSE	DEAL.MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE END  AS DEAL_EXPIRATION_DT,
COALESCE(CASE	WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5,7) THEN  DEAL.MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME 
	WHEN	TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (1,3) THEN QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME 
ELSE	TRIM(DEAL.MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME) END,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_STATUS_CD,
DEAL.EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE AS EXPECTED_CLOSE_DTM,
DEAL.DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE AS EXPECTED_BOOKING_DT,
TRAN.MIN_DATE AS FIRST_APPROVAL_DT,
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_SCOPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_SCOPE_CD,
CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN(1,3) THEN COALESCE(DEAL.PDR_PROD_VALUE,0) WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5) THEN COALESCE(DEAL.MDM_PROD_VALUE,0) ELSE 0 END AS EXPECTED_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_SOURCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(DEAL.QUOTE_FLAG,'N') AS QUOTE_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG,'N') AS ACTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN(1,3) THEN COALESCE(DEAL.PDR_SERV_VALUE,0) WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5) THEN COALESCE(DEAL.MDM_SERV_VALUE,0) ELSE 0 END AS EXPECTED_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL.CDP_FLAG,'N') AS CDP_FLG,
COALESCE(DCON.DEAL_BOOKING_NET_USD,0) AS EXPECTED_DEAL_BOOKING_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN DEAL.RFP_FLAG = 'Yes' THEN 'Y' WHEN DEAL.RFP_FLAG = 'No' THEN 'N' ELSE 'N' END AS RFP_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,'N') AS SRC_RPRTD_REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG,'N') AS SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.CDP_FLAG,'N') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_CDP_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DEAL.SFDC_OPTY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'WITH OPPORTUNITY' ELSE 'WITHOUT OPPORTUNITY' END AS WITH_OPPORTUNITY_TYPE,
COALESCE(TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE),0) AS DEAL_TYPE, --Added Trim to exclude spaces as part of CCW Data fix Aug rel
COALESCE(DEAL.ACTIVE_WORKFLOW,'UNKNOWN') AS ACTIVE_WORKFLOW_CD,
DEAL.CREATED_ON AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
DEAL.DM_UPDATE_DATE AS DEAL_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
'=' AS APPROVED_ROLE,
AM_A.MEMBER_CCO_ID AS ACCOUNT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
CAM_A.MEMBER_CCO_ID AS CHANNEL_ACCT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
COALESCE(RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DEAL.FIRST_INSTALLATION_DT AS FIRST_INSTALLATION_DTM,
COALESCE(DEAL.REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,'N') AS REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
DEAL.OBJECT_ID AS SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
DEAL.DEAL_DURATION AS DEAL_DURATION_MONTHS_CNT,
CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_SCOPE_NAME = 'Global Deal' THEN TRIM(CAST(COALESCE(PDEAL.OPTY_NUMBER,'-999') AS BIGINT)) 
ELSE '-999' END AS RU_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
DEAL.DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME AS DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
CASE WHEN NCWP_U.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DEAL.UPDATED_BY ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
'N' AS RU_FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.MDM_SERV_VALUE,0) AS RU_MDM_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
'N' AS SLA_ROLE,
COALESCE(DEAL.MDM_PROD_VALUE,0) AS RU_MDM_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
TRIM(COALESCE(DEAL.PROD_SALES_PATH,'UNKNOWN')) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_PRDT_SLS_PATH_CD, --Added Trim to remove spaces as part of CCW data fix Aug rel
TRIM(COALESCE(DEAL.SERV_SALES_PATH,'UNKNOWN')) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_SVC_SLS_PATH_CD, --Added Trim to remove spaces as part of CCW data fix Aug rel
COALESCE(DEAL.MDM_SERV_VALUE + DEAL.PDR_SERV_VALUE,0)RU_SRC_RPTD_DL_SVC_CST_USD_AMT,
TRAN.MAX_DATE AS RU_APPROVED_DT, 
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.CREATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY END AS RU_DEAL_BATCH_USER_ID, 
DEAL.OPTY_NAME AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_OPTY_NAME,
DMASTER.LEVEL6_NODE AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_SALES_TERR_NAME,
DMASTER.MARKET_SEGMENT AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_MARKET_SGMT_NAME,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_GLBL_ULTIMATE_ID, 
DM_CUST.ACCOUNT_NAME AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(DM_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_TYPE_CD,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_COMP_TARGET_ID AS BIGINT) as RU_SRC_RPRTD_COMPANY_TARGET_ID, --Added to avoid spaces as part of ccw data fix Aug rel
CAST(DM_CUST.CR_ID AS BIGINT) as RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUST_REGISTRY_ID, --Added to avoid spaces as part of ccw data fix Aug rel
COALESCE(DM_CUST.ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
DEAL.VERTICAL_MARKET AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_VRTCL_MARKET_NAME,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CSC_SITE_ID, --Added to avoid spaces as part of ccw data fix Aug rel
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.CREATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY END AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_CREATED_CCO_ID,
CASE WHEN NCWP_U.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.UPDATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.UPDATED_BY END AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_UPDATED_CCO_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),                    
USER,                   
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),                    
USER,
DEAL.PDR_PROD_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_PRD_USD_AMT,
DEAL.PDR_SERV_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_SVC_USD_AMT,
DEAL.PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INIT_DL_STRTGC_VAL_TXT,
0 AS RU_SLA_SERVICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL.SUBMIT_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS FIRST_SUBMIT_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(DEAL.SUBMIT_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_FIRST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(DEAL.FINAL_BAND,'UNKNOWN') AS FINAL_BAND_CD,
COALESCE(TRAN.MAX_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS APPROVED_DTM,
COALESCE(TRAN.MIN_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS FIRST_APPROVED_DTM,
'N' AS MULTI_ELEMENT_DEAL_FLG,
RJD.MAX_DATE AS RU_DEAL_REJECTED_DTM,
CAST(RJD.MAX_DATE AS DATE) AS RU_DV_DEAL_REJECTED_DT,
/*Added below columns as part of EPS DEALS DATA FOUNDATION project*/
Deal.FINANCIAL_SUMMARY  AS  FINANCIAL_SUMMARY_TXT,
 NULL AS  XAAS_DEAL_FLG,
 DEAL.SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER  AS  SRC_ASSIGNED_OPPORTUNITY_NUM,  
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_OR_QUOTE,'UNKNOWN')  AS         DEAL_OR_QUOTE_CD, 
GET_WELL_PLAN_DESCR AS RU_GET_WELL_PLAN_TXT , 
COALESCE(FLAG_SPVTG,'N') AS         RU_SVC_PRVDR_VDO_TECH_GRP_FLG, 
COALESCE(DSA_REGSTR_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS         RU_DEAL_NS_REG_DTM,  
COALESCE(DD_ENGAGE_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS         RU_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DT,
COALESCE(DD_ENGAGE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  AS         RU_DV_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DT,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_COMP,'N') AS         RU_PRDT_COMPONENT_FLG ,
COALESCE(TSS_CORE_COMP,'N')  AS RU_SERVICE_COMPONENT_FLG ,
COALESCE(NS_SUMMARY_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS         RU_NS_TERMS_SUMMARY_TXT, 
COALESCE(APPROVAL_ROUTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS        RU_APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
COALESCE(AS_TRANSACTION_COMP,'N') as RU_AS_TRX_COMPONENT_FLG,
COALESCE(AS_SUBSCRIPTION_COMP,'N') as RU_AS_SBSCRPTN_COMPONENT_FLG,
COALESCE(EXE_SUMMARY_INTERNAL_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') as RU_ES_INTERNAL_DESC_TXT,
 COALESCE(IS_SA_DEAL,'N') as RU_ACQUIRED_COMPANY_DEAL_FLG,
CASE WHEN AUTO_CS_QUOTE = 'True' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as IS_CHNG_SUB_RENEWAL_QUOTE_FLG,  /*added as part of Firestorm*/
'CCW' AS SS_CODE,
'UNKNOWN' AS DEAL_INTENT_CD,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_REPORTED_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL DEAL  
LEFT JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL PDEAL
 ON DEAL.PARENT_OBJECT_ID = PDEAL.OBJECT_ID  
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_ID,SUM(ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS DEAL_BOOKING_NET_USD
--FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DM_DEAL_CONSUMPTION 
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DEAL_CONSUMPTION_AGGR GROUP BY DEAL_ID) DCON  /*Replaced ST with MT table as part of CCW data fix Aug rel*/
ON DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER = DCON.DEAL_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT A
WHERE MEMBER_ROLE = 'AM'
AND ACTIVE=1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY A.EDW_UPDATED_DATE DESC)=1) AM_A
ON AM_A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT B
WHERE MEMBER_ROLE = 'CAM'
AND ACTIVE=1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY B.EDW_UPDATED_DATE DESC)=1) CAM_A
ON CAM_A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.OBJECT_ID
/*LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DMR_DEAL_CUST_MAP CMAP 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CMAP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY CMAP.CUSTOMER_OBJECT_ID DESC)=1 ) CUST_MAP
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = CUST_MAP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER    DM_CUST
ON CUST_MAP.CUSTOMER_OBJECT_ID = DM_CUST.OBJECT_ID*/ /*Commented to retain only ST_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER*/
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER  DM_CUST   /* Modified to EL table to fetch history records */
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = DM_CUST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DEAL_MASTER DMASTER
ON DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER = DMASTER.OPTY_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SHARE_NODE_ID_INT ORDER BY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY DESC)=1) RSH
/*   ON RSH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR =  DMASTER.LEVEL6_NODE */
/* REMOVED AS A PART OF DEAL YERRITORY FIX BY UMA */
ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = DMASTER.SHARE_NODE_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID, OPP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY OPP
       WHERE OPP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG= 'N' 
       QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID ORDER BY OPP.SK_OPPORTUNITY_ID_INT DESC)=1) NP
ON DEAL.SFDC_OPTY_ID = NP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_OBJECT_ID OBJ,SOURCE SRC ,MIN (TRANSITION_DATE) MIN_DATE , MAX(TRANSITION_DATE) MAX_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_STATE_TRANSITION_INT_VW 
                  WHERE      STATE IN (7,13) GROUP BY 1,2) TRAN
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = TRAN.OBJ 
AND CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN(2,5) THEN 2 WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN (1,3) THEN 1 END = TRAN.SRC
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_OBJECT_ID OBJ,SOURCE SRC, MAX(TRANSITION_DATE) MAX_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_STATE_TRANSITION_INT_VW 
                  WHERE (STATE = 4 AND SOURCE = 1) OR (STATE =8 AND SOURCE = 2) GROUP BY 1,2)RJD
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = RJD.OBJ 
AND CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN(2,5) THEN 2 WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN (1,3) THEN 1 END =RJD.SRC 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
ON NCWP.CEC_ID = DEAL.CREATED_BY AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP_U
ON NCWP_U.CEC_ID = DEAL.UPDATED_BY AND NCWP_U.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_NS_DEAL_EXTN_VW NS_EXTN 
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID=NS_EXTN.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DEAL_OBJECT_ID,QUOTE_STATUS_NAME,QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_VW EL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY EL.UPDATED_ON DESC)=1
WHERE  (EL.IS_STRINGENT ='Y' OR EL.IS_FINALIZED ='Y')) QUOTE
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID=QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID

SELECT *
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT ST
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL WHERE DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT = ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
 AND DEAL.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' -- to filter out CCWR Deals
      )
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL ICQ WHERE ICQ.OBJECT_ID = ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID)
 AND ST.MEMBER_ROLE IN ('AM','CAM')

SELECT 
DISTINCT
 TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_ID) AS BK_DEAL_ID,
   NULL AS APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DTM,
 -999 AS RU_LGL_ASRR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 -999 AS RU_FN_CNTLR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 -999 AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE(NP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY,-999) AS OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
 NULL DEAL_EXPIRATION_DT,
 DEAL.DEAL_STATUS_DESC AS BK_DEAL_STATUS_CD,
 NULL AS EXPECTED_CLOSE_DTM,
 NULL AS EXPECTED_BOOKING_DT,
 NULL AS FIRST_APPROVAL_DT,
 'Regular Deal' AS DEAL_SCOPE_CD,
 0 AS EXPECTED_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
 'UNKNOWN' DEAL_SOURCE_CD,
  'N' AS QUOTE_FLG,
  'Y' AS ACTIVE_FLG,
 0 AS EXPECTED_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
  'N' AS CDP_FLG,
  0 AS EXPECTED_DEAL_BOOKING_USD_AMT,
 'N' RFP_FLG,
  'N' AS SRC_RPRTD_REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
  'N' AS SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLG,
  'N' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_CDP_FLG,
 CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE='Non Standard Deal' THEN 'Non-Standard Deal'
ELSE
 COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
 END AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DEAL.OPTY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'WITH OPPORTUNITY' ELSE 'WITHOUT OPPORTUNITY' END AS WITH_OPPORTUNITY_TYPE,
 0 AS DEAL_TYPE,
 'UNKNOWN' AS ACTIVE_WORKFLOW_CD,
 NULL AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
 NULL AS DEAL_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
 '=' AS APPROVED_ROLE,
 DEAL.ACCT_MNGR AS ACCOUNT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
 'UNKNOWN' AS CHANNEL_ACCT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
 COALESCE(RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NULL AS FIRST_INSTALLATION_DTM,
  'Y' AS REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
  TRIM(EL.EDW_DEAL_OBJECT_ID) AS SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT,
 CREATED_BY  AS RU_SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
 0 DEAL_DURATION_MONTHS_CNT,
 -999 AS RU_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
 NULL AS DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
 UPDATED_BY  AS RU_SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
 'N' AS RU_FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
 0 AS RU_MDM_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
 'N' AS SLA_ROLE,
 0 AS RU_MDM_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
 'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_PRDT_SLS_PATH_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_SVC_SLS_PATH_CD,
 0 AS RU_SRC_RPTD_DL_SVC_CST_USD_AMT,
 NULL RU_APPROVED_DT, 
NULL AS RU_DEAL_BATCH_USER_ID, 
 NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_OPTY_NAME,
  'UNKNOWN' AS  RU_SRC_RPRTD_SALES_TERR_NAME,
  'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_MARKET_SGMT_NAME,
   '-999' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_GLBL_ULTIMATE_ID,
    NULL RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUSTOMER_NAME,
  'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_TYPE_CD,
  '-999' AS  RU_SRC_RPRTD_COMPANY_TARGET_ID,
   TRIM(CR_ID) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUST_REGISTRY_ID,
  'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
 NULL AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_VRTCL_MARKET_NAME,
 -999 AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CSC_SITE_ID,
'UNKNOWN' RU_SRC_REPORTED_CREATED_CCO_ID,
'UNKNOWN' RU_SRC_REPORTED_UPDATED_CCO_ID,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,                    
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,                   
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                    
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  0 AS RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_PRD_USD_AMT,
  0 AS  RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_SVC_USD_AMT,
  NULL AS RU_PTNR_INIT_DL_STRTGC_VAL_TXT,
 0 AS RU_SLA_SERVICE_USD_AMT,
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS FIRST_SUBMIT_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS DV_FIRST_SUBMIT_DT,
  'UNKNOWN' AS FINAL_BAND_CD,
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS APPROVED_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS FIRST_APPROVED_DTM,
 'N' AS MULTI_ELEMENT_DEAL_FLG,
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_DEAL_REJECTED_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_DV_DEAL_REJECTED_DT,
   NULL AS FINANCIAL_SUMMARY_TXT,
   NULL AS  XAAS_DEAL_FLG,
   NULL AS  SRC_ASSIGNED_OPPORTUNITY_NUM, 
  'UNKNOWN'  AS         DEAL_OR_QUOTE_CD, 
    'UNKNOWN' RU_GET_WELL_PLAN_TXT,
  'N' AS         RU_SVC_PRVDR_VDO_TECH_GRP_FLG, 
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AS         RU_DEAL_NS_REG_DTM,  
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AS         RU_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)  AS         RU_DV_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DT,
  CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.COMP_PRODUCT)='true' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RU_PRDT_COMPONENT_FLG,
  CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.COMP_TSS)='true' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RU_SERVICE_COMPONENT_FLG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS         RU_NS_TERMS_SUMMARY_TXT, 
  'UNKNOWN' AS        RU_APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
  CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.COMP_AST)='true' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RU_AS_TRX_COMPONENT_FLG,
  CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.COMP_AS_SUB)='true' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RU_AS_SBSCRPTN_COMPONENT_FLG,
  'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ES_INTERNAL_DESC_TXT,
    'N' AS RU_ACQUIRED_COMPANY_DEAL_FLG,
   --NULL AS  XAAS_DEAL_FLG,
  'N' AS IS_CHNG_SUB_RENEWAL_QUOTE_FLG,  
  'REVCLOUD' AS SS_CODE,
  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 '=' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_DEAL DEAL    
 JOIN
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_REVCLOUD_DEAL  EL
 ON TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_ID)=TRIM(EL.DEAL_ID)
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID, OPP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY FROM 
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY OPP
        WHERE OPP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG= 'N' 
        QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID ORDER BY OPP.SK_OPPORTUNITY_ID_INT DESC)=1) NP
 ON DEAL.OPTY_ID = NP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
 ON NCWP.CEC_ID = DEAL.CREATED_BY AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP_U
 ON NCWP_U.CEC_ID = DEAL.UPDATED_BY AND 
 NCWP_U.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SHARE_NODE_ID_INT ORDER BY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY DESC)=1) RSH
ON TRIM(RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT) = TRIM(DEAL.SHARE_NODE_ID)
--
WHERE 1=1
     AND 
     NOT EXISTS
     (
     SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND
     WHERE SS_CODE in ('CCW','CCWR')  ---- added as part of CCWR changes
     AND  ND.BK_DEAL_ID=DEAL.DEAL_ID
      )
     AND
      NOT EXISTS
     (
     SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_DEAL WD
     WHERE SS_CODE in ('CCW','CCWR')  ---- added as part of CCWR changes
     AND  WD.BK_DEAL_ID=DEAL.DEAL_ID
      )

--SHOW STATS ON EXCEPDB_DV1.EX_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES
SELECT
DEAL_ID,
DEAL_TYPE,
DEAL_STATUS_DESC,
CR_ID,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_ON,
UPDATED_BY,
UPDATED_ON,
OPTY_ID,
DEAL_NAME,
ACCT_MNGR,
ROLE_NAME,
SHARE_NODE_NAME,
SHARE_NODE_ID,
COMP_PRODUCT,
COMP_TSS,
COMP_AS_SUB,
COMP_AST,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_DEAL DEAL
WHERE
  EXISTS
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND WHERE SS_CODE in ('CCW','CCWR')  ---- added as part of CCWR changes
    AND  ND.BK_DEAL_ID=DEAL.DEAL_ID
    )
     OR 
     EXISTS
    (
    SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL_KAFKA ELD
    WHERE ELD.OPTY_NUMBER=DEAL.DEAL_ID
    )
